case_title: HELENA NONG VS. LUIS HUMBERTO BIN XOL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2023 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-06-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-06-2023 BY JUDGE PANG LY. PLAINTIFF HELENA NONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUIS HUMBERTO BIN XOL IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $977.00 FILED BY NONG, HELENA AS TO DEFENDANT XOL, LUIS HUMBERTO BIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF NONG, HELENA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NONG, HELENA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT XOL, LUIS HUMBERTO BIN $1,547.91 PRINCIPAL, $128.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,675.91, SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION (MC-025 FORM) AND INCLUDED PLAINTIFF'S DOCUMENTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $98. SERVED FEB-14-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT XOL, LUIS HUMBERTO BIN
